services.atelier.copy: Commission handcrafted Begena, Kirar, drums, and manuscripts produced by artisans devoted to the Orthodox liturgy.

about.title: Guided by the liturgy, accountable to the faithful.
about.copy: Abel Begena is a collective of deacons, artisans, and cultural historians preserving Ethiopian Orthodox musical heritage. From Addis Ababa to diaspora communities, we steward instruments, lessons, archives, and e-commerce in one prayerful ecosystem.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our instruments, classes, and services.
faq.q1: How do I enroll in a class?
faq.a1: Create an account, browse our available classes, and complete the enrollment by submitting your payment reference. Once verified by our team, you'll gain access to all class materials and live sessions.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept Telebirr, CBE Birr, bank transfers, and international payments via Chapa. Simply provide your transaction reference during enrollment.
faq.a3: All instruments are blessed before shipment and carefully packaged. We ship worldwide through trusted partners with full tracking and insurance.
faq.q4: Can I request a custom instrument?
faq.a4: Yes! Contact us through the form below or email us directly. Our artisans can create custom Begena, Kirar, and other instruments to your specifications.
faq.a5: Once enrolled, you'll access live video sessions with our instructors, downloadable materials, and recordings. Classes are conducted via integrated video conferencing.
